topic: Can you name the last 5 World Cup winners?

hook.spoken_hook: Name the last five World Cup winners. Bet you miss one.

scenes.voiceover: Name the last five World Cup winners. Bet you miss one.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Deep black bg, huge gold 'NAME ALL 5?' header, the World Cup trophy glowing center, five gold question-mark cards in a row, premium quiz look, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: No Googling. Lock in your five right now. Here we go.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Five numbered slots 2022 down to 2006 with gold borders on black, all hidden behind question marks, a ticking-clock motif, premium broadcast quiz board, vertical 9:16.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty twenty-two, Qatar. Argentina. Messi finally got his hands on it.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2022 ARGENTINA' in gold over a celebration backdrop, a green check mark. No faces in the graphic.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty eighteen, Russia. France. A nineteen-year-old Mbappe lit it up.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2018 FRANCE' gold on black, a green check mark. No faces in the graphic.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty fourteen, Brazil. Germany. Gotze won it in extra time.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2014 GERMANY' gold on black, a green check mark. No faces in the graphic.

scenes.voiceover: Twenty ten, South Africa. Spain. Tiki-taka at its absolute peak.
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2010 SPAIN' gold on black, a green check mark. No faces in the graphic.

scenes.voiceover: And two thousand and six, Italy. That's all five. So how many did you actually get?
scenes.graphic_prompt: '2006 ITALY' gold on black, all five winners now lit in a column with check marks, big white 'HOW MANY?' prompt at the bottom. No faces.

scenes.voiceover: Get four or more and you know your football. Follow for your daily World Cup countdown.
scenes.graphic_prompt: Black to gold fade, bold white 'SUBSCRIBE' with a gold 'DAILY WORLD CUP' tag, the trophy faint behind, a drawn subscribe-arrow, premium broadcast outro, vertical 9:16.

comment_bait: How many out of 5 did you get? Be honest 👇
cta: Follow for your daily World Cup countdown
music_mood: playful tense quiz ticking that resolves triumphant on each reveal

thumbnail.concept: Five gold trophy slots, four revealed years, the most recent hidden behind a question mark

youtube_title: Can You Name the Last 5 World Cup Winners? (Most People Miss One)
youtube_description: A quick World Cup quiz: name the last five winners, 2022 back to 2006. How many did you get? Comment your score, then subscribe for a daily World Cup countdown. #WorldCup #football #quiz
instagram_caption: Name the last 5 World Cup winners… no Googling. How many did you get? Comment below and tag someone who'd fail.
tiktok_caption: bet you can't name all 5 World Cup winners 🏆 how many did you get?
